/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/llama-server.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/llama-server.dir/server.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/llama-server.dir/server-http.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/llama-server.dir/server-models.cpp.o" -o ../../bin/llama-server  -Wl,-rpath,/data/data/com.termux/files/home/build-gpu-adreno/bin: libserver-context.a ../ui/libllama-ui.a ../../bin/libllama-common.so.0.0.9190 ../../vendor/cpp-httplib/libcpp-httplib.a -lpthread ../../common/libllama-common-base.a ../../bin/libmtmd.so.0.0.9190 ../../bin/libllama.so.0.0.9190 ../../bin/libggml.so.0.12.0 ../../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.12.0 ../../bin/libggml-base.so.0.12.0 -lpthread /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/lib/libssl.so /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/lib/libcrypto.so
